import { Subscription } from '../Subscription'; import { SchedulerLike } from '../types'; export declare function executeSchedule(parentSubscription: Subscription, scheduler: SchedulerLike, work: () => void, delay: number, repeat: true): void; export declare function executeSchedule(parentSubscription: Subscription, scheduler: SchedulerLike, work: () => void, delay?: number, repeat?: false): Subscription; //# sourceMappingURL=executeSchedule.d.ts.map
